name: google-adk-skill-creator
description: Build, test, evaluate, and compose Google ADK skills with dynamic tool injection.

interface.shortDescription: Build, test, and compose Google ADK skills from Claude Code or Codex.
interface.longDescription: A skill for building, evaluating, and composing Google ADK skills using the SkillRuntime + adk_additional_tools pattern. Includes scaffolding, eval runners, description optimizer, and multi-skill composition.
defaultPrompt: Create a new Google ADK skill for me
Run evals on my existing ADK skill
Help me optimize my skill's description for better activation
